metadata.description: Consolidated candidate ranking across v8.0 and v9.0 milestones
metadata.ranking_criteria: Sorted by Tc_central descending; stability, accessibility, and confidence as secondary factors
metadata.VALD02: The 149 K room-temperature gap remains OPEN. No computational prediction changes this experimental fact.

v9_candidates.stability: HIGH (Hg1223 well-characterized; strain via substrate epitaxy feasible)
v9_candidates.accessibility: MEDIUM (requires DAC for pressure + epitaxial substrate for strain)
v9_candidates.confidence: MEDIUM (pipeline validated at 28% error; combined lever scaling is estimated, not self-consistent)
v9_candidates.notes: Best computational prediction. Upper bracket (205 K) is not central; requires most optimistic lambda_sf AND lowest mu*.

v9_candidates.confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH (cross-validated: predicted 136 K vs measured 153-166 K, consistent 17% underprediction)
v9_candidates.notes: Best cross-validated candidate. Pipeline underpredicts by 17% under pressure (consistent with 28% ambient benchmark).

v9_candidates.confidence: MEDIUM (van Hove tuning well-established in cuprate literature)
v9_candidates.notes: Most accessible high-Tc modification. No pressure required.
Historically demonstrated: (Hg,Tl)-1223 achieves up to 138 K ambient Tc.
Benchmark prediction. Experimental Tc = 151 K. Pipeline underpredicts by 28%.

v9_candidates.accessibility: LOW (requires specific A-site, strain, AND pressure)
v9_candidates.notes: Maximum-lever nickelate. Lower omega_sf (30 vs 41 meV) limits Tc below cuprates.

v9_candidates.confidence: HIGH (qualitative direction matches experiment: overdoping lowers Tc)
v9_candidates.notes: NEGATIVE FINDING: confirms SF dominance. Overdoping weakens AF nesting more than it boosts phonon coupling.

v9_candidates.confidence: MEDIUM (SF-03 PASS; lambda_sf from literature calibration)
v9_candidates.notes: Best nickelate without extreme levers. Matches 40 K ambient bulk; falls short of 80 K film target.

v8_candidates_for_reference.notes: Phonon-only ceiling. Captures 20-25% of experimental Tc.
Adding CuO2 layers beyond n=3 DECREASES Tc.
Below parent cuprate. Interface effects do not enhance phonon coupling.

hydride_reference.notes: Hydride Tc ceiling for this family. Ambient retention unsupported. Not a viable ambient-pressure candidate.

summary.pipeline_validation: DMFT+Eliashberg reproduces Hg1223 Tc within 30% (108 K vs 151 K). Framework validated.
summary.cuprate_ceiling_finding: Spin-fluctuation Tc ceiling near 145-165 K for isotropic Eliashberg with single-site DMFT. Extensions (cluster DMFT + anisotropic Eliashberg) needed to test if 200 K is reachable.
